2299760.name: Project Moonborn
2299760.description:
Sharpen your claws and unleash mayhem as a powerful werewolf den mother on a mission to rescue her kidnapped pups.

Unleash lupine fury and slash your way through a blazingly fast and ultra-violent 2D roguelike platformer set aboard an intergalactic space prison.


Decimate corrupt corporate humanoid clones and battle deadly droids to earn XP and learn powerful combat techniques to help you slay dangerous boss encounters and traverse treacherous environments. String together frantic jumps and pounces to rip your foes apart while traversing multi-levelled stages filled with loot and secrets and lost pups to rescue.



Key features
  • Brutal and Visceral Combat - Combine powerful attacks and blazing fast movement into a frantic dance of death.

  • Freeform Movement - Master deep movement mechanics for advanced platforming and added combat depth. Pounce, wall jump, slide, and more.

  • Roguelike Gameplay - Every run randomizes the environment, rewards and encounters - each new run is unique.

  • Werewolf Pups - Find and rescue pups and escort them safely back to your Wolf Den where they can be trained for combat, support or scavenging.

  • Customize your Wolf Den - Return to your den of respite between levels and display trophies of slain enemies, plant and harvest mystical seeds, train companions and more.

  • Grow Stronger - Collect XP and combat techniques to unlock new attacks, passive effects, mystical powers and combat companions.

  • Challenging Encounters - Battle foes who employ varied combat tactics and pack an arsenal of weaponry, gadgets and utilities.

  • Multiple Endings - Choices you make influence the fate of the player and companions.

  • Detailed 2D Retro Visuals - Hand crafted pixel art and graphics inspired by classic arcade titles.

The game is a solo developer project still in pre-alpha; all footage featured on this page is work in progress that is being constantly polished and updated.

英语*
